subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Thy letter was received. Although plunder and pillage brought forth grief and sorrow, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی نامه شما رسید اگرچه از تاراج و تالان اندوه و احزان روی نمود ولی
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
